commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b50013d316ca15898807e5a38e1d82fb40bd9f77)
commands.review_summary:
Adds a repo-local Crabbox skill snapshot plus `.crabbox.yaml`, actionlint runner labels, CODEOWNERS entries, and a `workflow_dispatch` Crabbox hydrate workflow constrained to the `crabbox`/`openclaw`/`graincrawl` self-hosted runner labels.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a user bug; yes for the review finding by source inspection. The PR adds `.agents/skills/crabbox/SKILL.md`, while the prior setup discussion points to the shared `openclaw/agent-skills` source and that shared source already differs from the copied snapshot.
commands.review_followup: This member-authored draft needs maintainer/security-owner judgment on the shared-skill vendoring exception and the amount of live Crabbox proof required before merge.

target.title: chore: add constrained Crabbox setup
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds the exact Crabbox skill copied from `openclaw/openclaw`.
- Adds constrained Crabbox config and hydrate workflow with repo-specific self-hosted runner labels.
- Adds actionlint runner-label config and CODEOWNERS coverage for the new automation surfaces.

This is the narrowed replacement shape for the earlier broad setup baseline. It intentionally does not add CodeQL, stale automation, licensing changes, Dependabot, package-manager files, or unrelated policy defaults.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- Ruby YAML parse for `.crabbox.yaml`, `.github/actionlint.yaml`, and `.github/workflows/crabbox-hydrate.yml`
- `actionlint -config-file .github/actionlint.yaml .github/workflows/crabbox-hydrate.yml`
- Crabbox skill SHA-256 matched `openclaw/openclaw`: `ed512c0b0385fae7f6c5c14a7e9e6236ab68936506687a99ca976873492bdc43`
- Private-path scan for new public files
- `test -z "$(gofmt -l .)"`

## Notes

No live Crabbox lease was started for this setup-only patch.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
